title: Biomes of Wonders
description: New biomes adds minerals to discover.
body:
This mod introduces an exciting expansion to your Minecraft world with the addition of three unique new biomes, each packed with new minerals to discover.

This Are The biomes That this Mod 
Adds

1. The River Of piece
2. Purple Poppy Meadows
3. Verdant Valley

   ![3 new Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4be274c6c82d0e9d21737587f9eeef142775533.png)![New Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23065b927e9cfbdcc779398c0fa18286582a800e.png)
